sections.markdown:
- Activity: Afternoon Run
- Started: 2025-07-17 17:50
- Distance: 8.5 km
- Moving time: 48:28
- Elapsed time: 48:31
- Elevation gain: 163.4 m
- Average heart rate: 165.2 bpm
- Max heart rate: 175 bpm
- Average watts: 224.6 W
- Average speed: 10.5 km/h
- Apple Health recorded `3` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `165.2 bpm`, ranging from `160.9` to `168.0 bpm`.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `171.9 spm`, with a working range of `114.3` to `174.7 spm` after excluding `1` start-stop outlier below `100 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `171.3 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `170.7 spm` (-0.6 spm), which looks mechanically stable.

- Strava moving pace averaged `5:42 /km` across `8.514 km` in `48:28` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `5:34 /km` and second-half pace was `5:49 /km` (+15 s/km), so pace eased a little late.

- Strava summary HR came in at `165.2 bpm` average and `175 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `163.0 bpm` in the first half and `166.6 bpm` in the second (+3.7 bpm), which shows a modest late rise in aerobic cost.

- Moving time was `48:28` out of `48:31` elapsed (99.9%), which kept stoppage cost negligible.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `6` stop segments and `0.7%` stationary samples, so the run was mostly continuous with a few interruptions.

- Strava logged about `174.2 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `29.0 m` and `64.0 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `83.2 m` in the first half and `91.0 m` in the second, so the climbing load was split fairly evenly.
